$comment: Source of truth for the OUTGOING manifest's version-contract fields. CI (.github/workflows/frontend-publish.yml) reads this file and stamps these values into the published manifest.json. See /tmp/min-installer-architecture.md §6 for the publish-time invariants. Bump min_installer in the same commit that breaks compatibility with an older binary; CI enforces requires_api lower bound >= min_installer and that min_installer never decreases.
